Formerly: EDPL725.

EDHI743 Leadership Theory (3 Credits)

Critical analysis of contemporary leadership theoretical constructs. Consideration of implications for organizational improvement. Prerequisite: EDHI642.

Credit Only Granted for. EDHI743, EDPL743, or EDPS743.

Formerly: EDPL743.
